boxDescription: The instrument panel fuse block is in the center console between the driver and passenger seats. To access the fuses, open the fuse panel door, or remove the panel from the passenger side by pulling it out.

fuses.description: External object calculating/Side blind zone alert

boxDescription: The rear compartment fuse block is in the cargo area, on the driver side of the vehicle behind the lower trim panel. To open, turn the latch with a flat-bladed tool and pull the trim panel from the edges to fold it down.
